shortDescription: UKVI family route · Appendix FM · Minimum income & relationship proof

policyAlert.summary: Confirm current spouse visa fee (£1,846) and IHS rates on gov.uk. Minimum income threshold rules change—verify before quoting.

alert.title: Financial requirement + genuine relationship
alert.body: Both minimum income (or savings) and genuine relationship evidence must be met. Weak on either is a refusal risk.

about.label: Description
about.value: Family visa for spouse, civil partner, or unmarried partner of British citizen or person with settled/pre-settled status in UK. Leads to ILR pathway after qualifying period.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Valid marriage/civil partnership or 2+ years cohabitation · Sponsor meets financial requirement · Adequate accommodation · English A1 (entry) · Genuine relationship

about.label: Financial requirement
about.value: Sponsor must meet minimum income threshold or qualify via savings. Rules updated periodically—verify current threshold on gov.uk.

about.label: Key authority
about.value: UK Visas and Immigration (UKVI) — Home Office

about.label: After approval
about.value: Initial visa typically 33 months (if applying from outside UK); extension and ILR pathway. Maintain genuine relationship and comply with conditions.

eligibility.criterion: Sponsor is British citizen or settled/pre-settled

eligibility.note: Marriage cert or 2+ years cohabitation proof
Income or savings per Appendix FM

redFlagsBanner: If refused on financial or relationship grounds, address specific refusal reasons before reapplication—do not resubmit same weak evidence.

redFlags.title: Financial requirement not met
redFlags.description: Sponsor income below threshold without qualifying savings.
redFlags.fix: Calculate on gov.uk; combine permitted income sources or use savings route

redFlags.title: Weak relationship evidence
redFlags.description: Few photos, no cohabitation proof, inconsistent timeline.
redFlags.fix: Chronological relationship narrative; communication logs; visit evidence

redFlags.title: Wrong relationship category
redFlags.description: Unmarried partner without 2 years cohabitation evidence.
redFlags.fix: Verify FM requirements; marriage or sufficient cohabitation proof

redFlags.title: Accommodation inadequate
redFlags.description: Overcrowded housing or no proof of UK address.
redFlags.fix: Tenancy agreement, council tax, photos of property

faqs.q: Can we guarantee spouse visa approval?
faqs.a: No. UKVI assesses financial, relationship, and eligibility criteria. Genuine marriages can still face refusals if evidence is weak.
Threshold changes with policy—verify current amount on gov.uk Appendix FM. Can combine salaried/non-salaried income or use savings alternative.
Yes, if meeting specified savings amount held for required period. Calculate per gov.uk guidance.
Typically 5 years on spouse route (with extensions). Verify current ILR rules and English requirements at each stage.
Yes, generally no work restrictions on spouse visa—verify conditions on grant letter.
Yes if legally valid. Provide marriage certificate; certified translation if not in English.

faqs.q: What if sponsor is on benefits?
faqs.a: Some benefits count toward income; others don't. Check permitted income sources on gov.uk.
Yes for Indian applicants from approved clinic before application.

compliance: Complex cases may need immigration solicitor—refer when appropriate
Client must provide truthful relationship and financial evidence
Separate consultancy, UKVI, IHS fees in quotes
proTips: Calculate financial requirement at intake before fee collection
Build relationship timeline document from first meeting
Collect UK accommodation evidence early from sponsor
Book A1 SELT for beneficiary in parallel with document prep
Pay IHS using gov.uk calculator—save receipt
postApproval: Explain visa validity and BRP/collection if applicable
Remind on extension timeline before expiry
Guide on English requirements for ILR pathway
Connect to UK settlement briefing if offered

timeline.title: TB test, SELT, IHS payment, submission

changelog.author: Service Library
changelog.summary: Expanded quiz to 75 levelled questions (25 per level).

changelog.author: Service Library
changelog.summary: Initial UK spouse/partner visa counselor content.

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: Always verify current minimum income threshold on gov.uk—policy changes affect quotes.

staffNotes.author: Quality
staffNotes.text: Mandatory financial calculation worksheet sign-off before submission.

options: Only lottery winnings

options: 1 week dating

options: Any clinic
UKVI-approved clinic
No test
US embassy

options: Calculate financial requirement
Guarantee spouse visa approval
Collect relationship evidence
Verify IHS
quiz.explanation: No approval guarantees permitted.

donts: Do not guarantee spouse visa approval

Do not use non-UKVI SELT when required
Do not quote outdated income threshold
